name: Love Thumper
description: Legendary Bandit roid shield for melee builds. Let it break, then use the huge recharge delay to stay at zero capacity so the roid bonus stays active. While empty, melee hits also trigger an explosive nova for extra damage. Best on Zer0; strong on Gaige via Sharing is Caring (equip on Deathtrap, then swap); useful for shield-down setups like Fleet or Mania. Offers little protection, so reliable healing helps.
notes:
Bandit shield with a Torgue-style explosive nova; the nova can roll alongside other elemental resistances.

The Bandit Technical sawblade launcher can trigger the nova (counts as melee) but also damages the vehicle.

Good for Roid Rage farming; a low-level copy works well in low-level areas.

Recharge delay is extreme and taking damage refreshes it. To force a refill, briefly swap to a fast-recharging shield, then swap back.

Nova damage benefits from grenade and explosive boosts. The nova can hurt allies, and can also hit Gaige if Deathtrap is wearing the shield.

Distinctive look with a yellow heart motif.

special.description:
Huge roid melee bonus with massively increased recharge delay.

At zero capacity, melee hits release an explosive nova for extra explosive damage.
special.title: If thumping you is wrong, I don't want to be right.

abilities: When depleted, melee attacks deal bonus Roid Damage.
